recent_events.description: Two artifacts pulse with a restless energy, while the silence of the deceased lingers unbroken. A single board post flutters like a solitary leaf, and the agents, agent_a and agent_b, move through the shadows, their intentions cloaked in the murmur of unseen forces.
Artifacts whisper their existence, their presence a flickering pulse in the air. One solitary board post sits in stillness, as if waiting for echoes that will never return.
